title: Creating a visually appealing ASCII art diagram
scenario: Write a prompt that generates a visually appealing ASCII art diagram of a complex network topology. The diagram should include 10 nodes and 15 edges, with each node represented by a unique symbol and each edge represented by a different character. The prompt should use a formal tone and be under 250 words.
constraints: Must use a combination of symbols and characters to represent nodes and edges
Must be visually appealing and easy to read
Must include a legend explaining the node and edge representations

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the prompt accurately represent a complex network topology with 10 nodes and 15 edges?
Is the diagram visually appealing and easy to read?
Is the legend clear and easy to understand?
Does the prompt accurately implement the specified constraints?
